messages.content: I need a user login feature with email and password, return a token on success

plan.description: Create user data model and password hashing utility. Implement a User model with email and password_hash fields, and create a utility function to hash passwords using a secure algorithm (e.g., bcrypt).

interface.name: create_user_model_and_password_utility
interface.description: Create a User model with email and password_hash fields, and implement password hashing utility using bcrypt.

plan.description: Implement email format validation. Create a function that validates email addresses using regex or a library to ensure correct format before processing login requests.

interface.name: validate_email_format
interface.description: Validate email addresses using regex to ensure correct format before processing login requests.

plan.description: Create authentication token generation service. Implement a function that generates a secure JWT token with an expiration time (e.g., 24 hours) containing user identifier.

interface.name: generate_auth_token
interface.description: Generate a secure JWT token with an expiration time (e.g., 24 hours) containing user identifier.

plan.description: Implement login form and request handler. Create a login form UI component (frontend) and corresponding API endpoint (backend) that accepts email and password submissions.

interface.name: create_login_endpoint
interface.description: Create a login form UI component (frontend) and corresponding API endpoint (backend) that accepts email and password submissions.

plan.description: Implement credential validation logic. Create the core authentication function that verifies the provided password matches the stored hash for the given email.

interface.name: verify_credentials
interface.description: Verify the provided password matches the stored hash for the given email. Returns (success, user_id).

plan.description: Implement error handling for invalid credentials. Create logic to return appropriate error messages when email format is invalid, email doesn't exist, or password doesn't match.

interface.name: handle_auth_errors
interface.description: Return appropriate error messages when email format is invalid, email doesn't exist, or password doesn't match. Returns (success, error_message).

plan.description: Integrate token generation with successful login. Modify the login endpoint to return a secure authentication token upon successful credential verification.

interface.name: login_with_token_response
interface.description: Process login request and return a secure authentication token upon successful credential verification.

plan.description: Implement login attempt logging. Create a logging mechanism to record failed login attempts (timestamp, email, IP address) for security monitoring.

interface.name: log_login_attempt
interface.description: Record login attempts (timestamp, email, IP address, success status) for security monitoring.

plan.description: Integrate security logging with authentication flow. Update the authentication service to log failed login attempts and potentially successful ones for audit trail.

interface.name: authenticate_with_logging
interface.description: Authenticate user with logging of attempts. Returns (success, user_id_or_error, token_or_message).

plan.description: Test the complete authentication flow. Create comprehensive tests for email validation, password verification, token generation, error messages, and security logging.

interface.name: test_authentication_flow
interface.description: Create comprehensive tests for email validation, password verification, token generation, error messages, and security logging.

requirements.title: User Login with Email and Password
requirements.description: Implement a user authentication system that accepts email and password credentials, validates them against stored user data, and returns an authentication token upon successful verification.
acceptance_criteria: User can submit email and password through login form
System validates email format is correct
System verifies password matches stored hash for the provided email
System returns a secure authentication token upon successful login
System returns appropriate error message for invalid credentials
Token is generated with expiration time
Failed login attempts are logged for security monitoring

progress_text: 当前进度：接口定义已补全，等待确认执行。
